name: Bank Of Queensland Limited.
analysis: BOQ has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 17% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$6.2800, stop A$5.8509, target A$6.9156 (1.48:1) — then trail it.
